tasks.name: Permits & approvals
tasks.notes: ~1–2.5% of build cost (avg $8k–$20k in MA). Rates typically $12–$16 per $1,000 of construction value; sub-permits for plumbing, electrical, and HVAC add $500–$1,500 more.

tasks.name: Surveying
tasks.notes: ~0.3–0.8% of build cost (avg $2.5k–$6.5k in MA). New construction bundle includes boundary, staking, and topo. Separate septic design survey adds $3k–$4k.

tasks.name: Site plan & architect
tasks.notes: ~4–12% of build cost (avg $25k–$80k in MA). MA architects typically 8–15% of build cost for full services (SD through CA). Design-only runs $25k–$50k.

tasks.name: Financing close
tasks.notes: ~1–2% of build cost (avg $8k–$18k in MA). Construction loan origination typically 1–1.5% of loan amount plus title, appraisal, and inspection draw fees.

tasks.name: Demolition / clearing
tasks.notes: ~0.4–1.5% of build cost (avg $3k–$15k in MA). Light suburban clearing $2.4k–$6.6k; dense woodland or house demo adds $10k–$21k. Oil tank or asbestos removal adds significantly.

tasks.name: Grading
tasks.notes: ~0.5–1.2% of build cost (avg $3.5k–$10k in MA). MA rocky terrain is common — ledge blasting adds $5k–$20k if encountered. Frost drainage requirements add scope.

tasks.name: Utility hookups
tasks.notes: ~2–6% of build cost (avg $15k–$50k+ in MA). Title 5 septic alone costs $15k–$30k for lots not on municipal sewer — major MA-specific cost. Electric service + gas tap adds $2k–$8k.

tasks.name: Excavation
tasks.notes: ~1–2.5% of build cost (avg $8k–$20k in MA). MA frost line is 48", requiring deeper digs than southern states. Ledge common in eastern/central MA — adds $5k–$25k if hit.

tasks.name: Footings
tasks.notes: ~0.6–1.5% of build cost (avg $5k–$12k in MA). MA code requires footings minimum 4 ft below grade due to frost depth. Wider footings needed on softer soils.

tasks.name: Slab / basement pour
tasks.notes: ~3–6% of build cost (avg $25k–$50k in MA). Full basements are standard in MA for frost protection and added living space. Includes poured concrete walls + floor slab.

tasks.name: Waterproofing
tasks.notes: ~0.6–1.5% of build cost (avg $5k–$13k in MA). Interior perimeter drain + sump system expected due to MA water tables and heavy frost-thaw cycles. Basic damp-proofing starts ~$2.5k.

tasks.name: Floor system
tasks.notes: ~1.5–2.5% of build cost (avg $12k–$22k in MA). Engineered LVL and I-joists standard in MA for longer spans. MA regional labor cost multiplier ~1.38x national avg.

tasks.name: Walls
tasks.notes: ~2–3.5% of build cost (avg $15k–$28k in MA). MA energy code (IECC 2021) drives 2×6 exterior walls — thicker and costlier than the 2×4 minimum common in other states.

tasks.name: Roof structure
tasks.notes: ~1.5–2.5% of build cost (avg $12k–$22k in MA). Snow load 40–50 psf across most of MA requires heavier framing than southern states. Engineered trusses are common.

tasks.name: Sheathing
tasks.notes: ~1–1.8% of build cost (avg $8k–$15k in MA). Continuous sheathing required for MA braced-wall compliance. Zip system or housewrap over OSB is standard.

tasks.name: Roofing
tasks.notes: ~2–3.5% of build cost (avg $15k–$30k in MA). Ice-and-water shield required on first 6 ft of eave per MA code due to ice dams. Architectural shingles standard.

tasks.name: Windows & doors
tasks.notes: ~2.5–5% of build cost (avg $18k–$45k in MA). MA energy code requires U-factor ≤ 0.30; triple-pane increasingly common. Standard package = 20–25 windows + exterior doors.

tasks.name: Siding
tasks.notes: ~1.5–3.5% of build cost (avg $12k–$30k in MA). Fiber cement (HardiePlank) is dominant in MA at $10–$18/sq ft installed. Vinyl is $5–$10/sq ft.

tasks.name: Driveway rough
tasks.notes: ~0.3–0.7% of build cost (avg $2.5k–$6.5k in MA). Crushed stone base only at this stage; asphalt/concrete finish deferred to punch list. MA towns often require paved apron at road.

tasks.name: Plumbing rough-in
tasks.notes: ~1.8–3.5% of build cost (avg $14k–$28k in MA). MA requires a licensed Master Plumber to pull permits and sign off. Includes supply, DWV, and gas rough.

tasks.name: Electrical rough-in
tasks.notes: ~1.5–2.5% of build cost (avg $10k–$22k in MA). MA requires a licensed electrician; 200-amp service is standard; EV-ready outlet increasingly required.

tasks.name: HVAC
tasks.notes: ~2.5–4.5% of build cost (avg $18k–$35k in MA). Cold-climate heat pumps eligible for MassSave rebates up to $10k. Propane/gas hybrid still common; mini-split systems add cost.

tasks.name: Insulation
tasks.notes: ~1.5–3% of build cost (avg $12k–$25k in MA). MA IECC 2021 requires R-20 walls, R-49 attic, R-10 foundation. Spray foam at rim joists standard. MassSave rebates available.

tasks.name: Drywall
tasks.notes: ~2–3.5% of build cost (avg $15k–$28k in MA). $1.50–$3.50/sq ft installed; a 2,400 sq ft home has ~8,000–10,000 sq ft of surface. MA labor rates push toward upper end.

tasks.name: Painting
tasks.notes: ~1–2.2% of build cost (avg $8k–$18k in MA). Full interior primer + 2-coat finish; ~$2–$4/sq ft of paintable surface in MA. Vaulted ceilings and detailed trim add cost.

tasks.name: Flooring
tasks.notes: ~2.5–5.5% of build cost (avg $20k–$45k in MA). Hardwood $10–$22/sq ft installed; tile $10–$25/sq ft. Boston-area labor runs 10–20% above national avg.

tasks.name: Trim & cabinets
tasks.notes: ~3.5–7% of build cost (avg $25k–$60k in MA). Semi-custom kitchen cabinets $15k–$35k; bath vanities $3k–$8k; interior trim $8k–$15k. High-end finishes easily double this.

tasks.name: Plumbing fixtures
tasks.notes: ~0.8–2% of build cost (avg $6k–$16k in MA). Includes toilets, kitchen + bath sinks, tub/shower units, faucets — mid-grade (Kohler/Moen/Delta). MA requires licensed plumber for final install.

tasks.name: Electrical fixtures
tasks.notes: ~0.7–1.8% of build cost (avg $5k–$14k in MA). 200A panel + lighting allowance throughout. Smoke/CO detectors required on every floor and in each bedroom per MA code.

tasks.name: Appliances
tasks.notes: ~0.6–2% of build cost (avg $5k–$18k in MA). Standard stainless kitchen package (range, dishwasher, refrigerator, microwave). Often not included in GC contract — confirm scope.

tasks.name: Final inspections
tasks.notes: ~0.05–0.2% of build cost (avg $500–$2k in MA). Separate finals required for building, plumbing, electrical, and gas. MA municipal inspectors — scheduling delays are common and can delay closing.

tasks.name: Punch list
tasks.notes: ~0.7–2.5% of build cost (avg $5k–$20k in MA). Typically 1–3% of contract value held as retainage and applied to punch list items. Budget 2% for a mid-grade build.

tasks.name: Landscaping
tasks.notes: ~0.6–2.5% of build cost (avg $5k–$20k in MA). Finish grading, topsoil, hydroseed, and foundation plantings. MA towns may require a landscaping plan approved before CO is issued.

tasks.name: Certificate of Occupancy
tasks.notes: ~<0.1% of build cost (avg $50–$500 in MA). The CO fee itself is nominal; the real cost is coordination time. Temporary occupancy permits may carry monthly fees (e.g., $50/mo in some towns).
